Description: The specific program and cycle being tracked for this applicant or recipient.

The applicant, participant or award recipient. This person must already exist in the People list. For Peer-to-Peer and other community programs, enter the name of the principal or president. For all others, it should be the primary PI.
The primary or proxy contact for this participant.
The status of this participant's application in the program cycle.

Description: The team member responsible for tracking and all follow ups for this applicant, during this program cycle. This team member receives notifications for follow up.
The research area focus for this event, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
The research methodology and applications focus for this event, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
The population focus for this event, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
Custom tags and keywords for searching.
Additional notes, comments, links, or important remarks.
Average value of all the ratings that have been submitted
Number of ratings submitted
If this consultation was a result of an email communication, link that email tracker entry here.
The person who referred this project team to us for a consultation.
Indicates whether this application was approved, rejected, or withdrawn.

Description: Project milestones log.
DefaultValue: Milestone Date Completed Notes

Description: The date when a full application was received.
Optional. The date when follow up is required. If set, a notification will be sent to the assignee on this date.

Description: The date when this project is considered officially closed. This date may affect reporting for some programs.
System field used by automations to keep track of the last version that was modified automatically. This helps prevent infinite loops.
System field used by automations to keep track of the last workflow that modified this item. This helps prevent infinite loops.
Total awards given to participant. This is a sum of all positive amounts entered under budget tracking.
Total expenses reported by participant. This is a sum of all negative amounts entered under budget tracking.
The overall balance (awards + expenses), as entered under budget tracking.
The school affiliation (or program school) for the participant.
The job title of the primary or proxy contact.
The email of the primary or proxy contact.
Program Cycle ID
The total number of mentors participating with this applicant/school.
The total number of students, community partners, or other beneficiaries of the program awarded to this applicant or school.
